details.reasoning: Implementation is well-executed with all major components present: theme type definitions with required color properties, three built-in themes (t3-dark, t3-light, t3-midnight), ThemeProvider/useTheme hooks with local storage persistence, ThemeSelector component with detailed swatches, and CSS custom property support. No new dependencies or build changes. However, the rubric explicitly requires 'getTheme and listThemes utility functions' in the shared package. While getThemeById is exported (satisfying getTheme in spirit), the listThemes function is missing—only BUILT_IN_THEMES constant is exported. Function naming (getThemeById vs getTheme) also deviates from rubric specification. These are relatively minor gaps in an otherwise comprehensive and well-architected theme system.
